command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmds = [
    ["bun", "test", "./src/lib/partial-review-formatter.test.ts"],
    ["bun", "test", "./src/handlers/review.test.ts"],
    ["bun", "run", "tsc", "--noEmit"],
]
for cmd in cmds:
    start = time.time()
    p = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    duration = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
    print('COMMAND:', ' '.join(cmd))
    print('EXIT:', p.returncode)
    print('DURATION_MS:', duration)
    tail = (p.stdout + ('\n' + p.stderr if p.stderr else '')).strip().splitlines()
    for line in tail[-8:]:
        print(line)
    print('---')
PY
